CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout. The sum of the Value of all related Assets. Tip: to make changes, create or update a related Asset record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The sum of the Value of all related Assets.
Tip: to make changes, create or update a related Asset record.
CustomField.label: Total Assets
